a:r.a:t: This initial step involves establishing the data foundation by connecting to S/4HANA data products in SAP Datasphere and developing a Minimum Viable Product (MVP)—a single-page SAP Analytics Cloud story with basic aging analysis—to validate the core concept.

This initial step involves establishing the data foundation by connecting to S/4HANA data products in SAP Datasphere and developing a Minimum Viable Product (MVP)—a single-page SAP Analytics Cloud story with basic aging analysis—to validate the core concept.

This step involves integrating the predictive models from Databricks back into SAP Datasphere and developing the full, multi-page SAP Analytics Cloud story. This includes creating the detailed customer views and linked analysis between tabs.

This step involves refining the model performance, reviewing the logic with business SMEs, and conducting User Acceptance Testing (UAT) to ensure the solution meets business requirements and the predictive insights are accurate and actionable.

Deploy the finalized SAP architecture into the KPMG Velocity environment. Execute the go-to-market strategy by packaging the AR Intelligence solution as a repeatable asset, delivering sales enablement materials, demo scripts, and client-facing collateral to drive market adoption.

Post-deployment, this step involves monitoring system performance and tracking value capture against KPIs. It also includes finalizing the future roadmap and planning for the next phase of enhancements (e.g., Credit Limit Breach Indicators, Unapplied Cash Monitoring).
